name: Equinox (Elegant Neural Networks in JAX)

performance.notes: JAX JIT compilation; same performance as raw JAX after compilation

agent_readiness.notes: JAX neural network library that treats models as PyTrees. import equinox as eqx. class MyModel(eqx.Module): weight: jax.Array. Pytree-based model: models are just data structures compatible with jax.jit, jax.grad without any transform wrappers. eqx.nn.Linear, eqx.nn.Conv2d, eqx.nn.GRU. eqx.filter_jit, eqx.filter_grad. Much cleaner than Haiku (no init/apply split). Similar ergonomics to PyTorch. Neural ODEs via diffrax integration. Growing popularity in academic JAX research.

gotchas: Smaller ecosystem than PyTorch Lightning or Keras
Less mature than Flax for production deployments
best_when: Neural ODE / differential equation models (diffrax integration)
Academic researchers preferring clean functional-OOP hybrid style
When Haiku's init/apply split feels too complex
avoid_when: Large team projects (Flax better documented for teams)
summary: Equinox provides elegant JAX neural networks by treating models as PyTrees. class MyModel(eqx.Module): weight: jax.Array — no init/apply split needed. eqx.filter_jit and eqx.filter_grad work directly. PyTorch-like ergonomics for JAX. eqx.nn.Linear, Conv2d, GRU. Neural ODE support via diffrax. Cleaner than Haiku; growing alternative to Flax for academic JAX research.
